recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: The Art of Self-Defense
recommendations.overview: Casey is attacked at random on the street and enlists in a local dojo led by a charismatic and mysterious Sensei in an effort to learn how to defend himself. What he uncovers is a sinister world of fraternity, violence and hypermasculinity and a woma

recommendations.title: The Nightshifter
recommendations.overview: Stênio, the nightshifter of a morgue, has the ability to communicate with the cadavers that are brought to him every night.

recommendations.title: The Uninvited Guest
recommendations.overview: Mysterious events lead an increasingly paranoid architect to believe a stranger is lurking in his large house.

recommendations.title: From the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple on a trip through the Irish countryside find themselves hunted by a creature who only attacks at night.

recommendations.title: You Are Not My Mother
recommendations.overview: In a North Dublin housing estate, teenage Char's mother mysteriously goes missing. When she returns without explanation, Char resolves to uncover the truth behind her disappearance and shed light on her family's dark secrets.

recommendations.title: Roar
recommendations.overview: Roar follows a family who are attacked by various African animals at the secluded home of their keeper.

recommendations.title: Watcher
recommendations.overview: As a serial killer stalks the city, Julia — a young actress who just moved to town with her husband — notices a mysterious stranger watching her from across the street.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.
